a:r.a:t: Commentary on the assumptions in the first year of the forecast (e.g., pipeline unwind/link to historical KPIs/gross profit assumptions).
FYxx onwards [second year onward of forecast]
Commentary on the assumptions on the second year of the forecast and years beyond (e.g., inflationary increase of [x]%/assumed price increases).
[Table and/or analysis for most recent financial period (e.g., FY21) and the forecast periods) showing split by products/customers/sites for specific revenue stream and the associated KPIs].
Comparing forecast to the historical trends and commenting on the reasonableness of the assumptions included within the forecast
Note: The prospective financial information has been prepared

. KPMG accepts no responsibility for the realization of the prospective financial information. Actual results are likely to be different from those shown in the prospective financial information, and the differences may be material.
Key: Supported by historical performance and outlook (e.g., contract
upported by historical performance and outlook (e.g., contract
Not supported by historical performance and outlook (e.g., contract
